# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: AWS CloudFormation EC2 instance with EBS volumes
Resources:
  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      ImageId: ami-0abcdef1234567890
      KeyName: my-key-pair
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/sdf
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 100
            DeleteOnTermination: true
            VolumeType: gp2
      
  EBSVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      Size: 100
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::GetAtt:
          - EC2Instance
          - AvailabilityZone
  
  EBSAttachement: 
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties: 
      InstanceId: 
        Ref: EC2Instance
      VolumeId: 
        Ref: EBSVolume
      Device: /dev/sdf

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: The Instance ID
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  PublicDNS:
    Description: Public DNSName of the instance
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicDnsName
  PublicIP:
    Description: The public IP address of the instance
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicIp
